summary: Stream the receipts index via incremental shards + CLI support.

steps.title: Capture streaming requirements
steps.notes: Documented backlog intent, CLI sketch, retention rules, and risks.

steps.title: Design shard schema + CLI
steps.notes: Defined shard manifest format, hash chaining, CLI flags, pointer file, and guard/transition plan in convergence spec.

steps.title: Implement generator + CI guard
steps.notes: Implemented streaming CLI/tests/docs, emitted hashed shards, and refreshed the latest pointer.

checkpoint.description: Streaming receipts index emits hashed shards and CI enforces freshness.
